SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT REMOVED THE TREE FROM HIS OWN PROPERTY BUT HAS NOT PAID THE PLAINTIFF THE AMOUNT THEY AGREED ON. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE SATISFIED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BERGMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PURSUANT TO THE JULY 19, 2017 COURT ORDER IF THE DEFENDANT PAYS THE PLAINTIFF $2,500.00 NEITHER PARTY WILL APPEAR AND CASE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BERGMAN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-19-2017 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT THE DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY THE PLAINTIFF AND REMOVE A TREE FROM HIS OWN PROPERTY THAT IS DAMAGING THE PLAINTIFF'S PROPERTY ON JULY 14, 2017. APPEARANCES ARE NOT REQUIRED IF THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ARE SATISFIED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM BERGMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDRE GROS-BALTHAZAR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
